Availability.description: Availability classification; controls whether the event occupies time.

Draft.description: A wall-clock event draft, resolved via timeZone + the request dstPolicy.

DstPolicy.description: Explicit resolution for a nonexistent (spring-forward gap) and an ambiguous (fall-back overlap) wall time. Absence is an error, never a guess.

EventStatus.description: Event status. A cancelled event is a tombstone that occupies no time.

Instant.description: A UTC instant; the only instant representation.

Interval.description: A half-open interval [start, end) over instants. end must not precede start; a zero-length interval [t, t) denotes the empty set.

ResolvedEvent.description: A resolved event: an id with a half-open [start, end) instant interval and optional status/availability classification.

WallTime.description: Wall-clock calendar components, resolved to an instant only via an explicit time zone + dstPolicy.

description: Turn a wall-clock `draft` or an already-resolved `selectedSlot` into a CREATE plan (hashes + resolved event); never a write. Provide exactly one of `draft` or `selectedSlot`. The draft path requires `dstPolicy`; the selectedSlot path requires top-level `id` and `calendarId`.

existing.description: Existing events to check against when validateConflicts/rejectOnConflict is set.

rejectOnConflict.description: Fail if a conflict is found. Defaults to false.

validateConflicts.description: Annotate the plan with conflicts. Defaults to false.

title: create_event_plan request
